## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run license:check`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=high`

## Notes

Call out any storage, OKF round-trip, Tauri shell, or JSONM design-system impact.
